name: Chocolate Struesel Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. In a large bowl, combine the flour, powdered sugar, and cocoa. Cut in the butter until crumbly. Set aside 2 cups of this mixture.
3. Press the remaining mixture firmly into the bottom of a 13" x 9" x 2" baking pan and bake for 15 minutes.
4. In a large bowl, beat the cream cheese until fluffy. Gradually beat in the sweetened condensed milk until smooth. Add the egg and vanilla extract, and mix well.
5. Pour the mixture over the baked crust.
6. Combine the nuts with the reserved crumb mixture; sprinkle over the cheese mixture.
7. Bake for 25 minutes or until bubbly. Cool and cut into bars. Makes 24 to 36 bars.
